theme: drowned catacombs with limestone stalactites, saltwater flooding, bone piles, skull torches

stalactite_cluster.usage: ceiling stalactites positioned above horizon line, repeated overhead

bone_pile_ancient.usage: bone pile clutter at wall bases

torch_sconce_skull.usage: wall torch between pillars, dim catacomb lighting

pillar_cracked_flooded.usage: cracked pillar with waterline mark, repeated backline architecture
